class TestProject_apply:

    def test_apply_no_ops__is_a_noop_____pun_intended(self):

    def test_apply_multiple_ops__applies_all(self):
        project = Project().apply(
            InsertMediaOp("c1", "a.mov", FrameRange(0, 6), at_frame=0),
            InsertMediaOp("c2", "b.mov", FrameRange(0, 4), at_frame=6),
        )

## ~/repos/github/g0t4/private-videos/poc-edit-model/tools/insert_media.py:6-26
class InsertMediaOp(Op):
    """
    Insert a recording (or any source media) into both video and audio
    tracks at the same frame -- the ordinary "add this to the timeline"
    operation. Both tracks' pieces share one clip_id: it's one insertion,
    just represented once per track.
    """

    def __init__(self, clip_id: str, source: str, source_range: FrameRange, at_frame: int):
        self.clip_id: str = clip_id
        self.source: str = source
        self.source_range: FrameRange = source_range
        self.at_frame: int = at_frame

    def apply(self, video: Track, audio: Track) -> tuple[Track, Track]:
        video_clip = SourceClip(self.clip_id, self.source, self.source_range)
        audio_clip = SourceClip(self.clip_id, self.source, self.source_range)
        return (
            video.insert_at(self.at_frame, video_clip),
            audio.insert_at(self.at_frame, audio_clip),
        )

## ~/repos/github/g0t4/private-videos/poc-edit-model/tests/tools/test_insert_media.py:26-44
class TestInsertMediaOp:

    def test_inserts_the_same_clip_id_into_both_tracks(self):
        project = Project().apply( \
            InsertMediaOp(clip_id="c1", source="a.mov", source_range=FrameRange(0, 12), at_frame=0),
        )
        assert project.video.clips == [SourceClip("c1", "a.mov", FrameRange(0, 12))]
        assert project.audio.clips == [SourceClip("c1", "a.mov", FrameRange(0, 12))]

    def test_inserting_a_second_clip_at_the_end(self):
        project = Project().apply(
            InsertMediaOp(clip_id="c1", source="a.mov", source_range=FrameRange(0, 12), at_frame=0),
            InsertMediaOp(clip_id="c2", source="b.mov", source_range=FrameRange(0, 6), at_frame=12),
        )
        assert project.video.clips == [
            SourceClip("c1", "a.mov", FrameRange(0, 12)),
            SourceClip("c2", "b.mov", FrameRange(0, 6)),
        ]
        assert project.audio.clips == project.video.clips
